title: tritonia fenestrata
intro: Tritonia fenestrata, also known as the Window Glass Lily or Yellow Tritonia, is a flowering plant species in the Iridaceae family. It has been traditionally used in South African medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Tritonia fenestrata typically involve drying and powdering the plant, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or capsules, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
